headline: Hilton Gears Up to Post Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: HLT is set to report Q1 2026 earnings on April 28, with solid group demand and unit growth in focus amid storms and softer U.S. trends.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Hilton Worldwide Holdings, Raises Price Target to $350
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Duane Pfenningwerth   maintains Hilton Worldwide Holdings (NYSE:HLT) with a In-Line and raises the price target from $335 to $350.
